title: Has anyone heard of AINQT
author: ClearyBuster
selftext: I was invited to this WhatsApp group awhile back where this person gives info on the market and different things. They promote there app which is a quantitative ai trading thing where you send crypto to deposit and withdraw funds. I was wondering if anyone has heard of it or had experience with it.

comments.author: CowApprehensive7934
comments.body: I’m in it right now. I just bought their 1k quant strategy. I think my two weeks is almost done. I’ll try to pull out this week and let you know if it’s legit or not.

replies.author: ClearyBuster
replies.body: It’s definitely some what legit cause I did try it and was able to pull out. The only thing I don’t get is why there so pushy on it cause I was in there group just for market analysis until they started making people do the trading to stay in the group.

replies.author: CowApprehensive7934
replies.body: I think it’s like a catch 22. You have to have money to make money. If they don’t have the funds to make you money then they can’t make money? I was able to make a like a little amount because I held on for two weeks. I’ll revisit and try for 2k next time. Then 5k after a month. I’m just a little apprehensive on making a very big deposit.

replies.author: ClearyBuster
replies.body: I get that I’m just still a little sketched out cause the head of the group told me to borrow money from a friend to do the ai trading

comments.author: Mattrv10
comments.body: It’s a scam. Tried withdrawing my profits recently and they are “On hold” it’s been a week and still haven’t seen them.

replies.author: ClearyBuster
replies.body: How much did you put in if you don’t mind me asking when they first started they had cheap ones like $200 ones and I was able to do it and withdraw but could be cause it was such a small amount

replies.author: Top-Listen4438
replies.body: Did you ever get your money back from Ainqt?

replies.author: Mattrv10
replies.body: No they are asking for me to send more money to get my money out

comments.author: Suck_mnut
comments.body: Anyone in there WhatsApp group chat?

replies.author: ClearyBuster
replies.body: Not anymore I was for awhile but they made a new one and you had to have a strategy with them to get let in

comments.author: Totheothermoon
comments.body: Joined recently.. did anyone successfully withdraw profits??

replies.author: ClearyBuster
replies.body: I was able to withdraw but I think It might have been due to it being a small amount

comments.author: GirthvVader
comments.body: AiNQT is a scam. They will not allow you to withdraw your money. I foolishly fell for this, but i am trying to warn everyone. If you are a real person and not a part of the scam do not deposit them any money. If you already submitted your info, you need to call the credit buereus and freeze your credit, report them to ic3.org the SEC and the app company you use (google play apple store etc.)
